description: Configure Stellarium to simulate the US Naval Observatory (38.9215 N, 77.0669 W) on July 4, 1876, using the UTC time zone. Determine the exact UTC transit time of the star Vega and align the simulation to that moment. Capture a screenshot of the transit saved to ~/Pictures/stellarium/ and record the star name, simulation date, and the observed UTC transit time in a log file at ~/Desktop/transit_log.txt.
